notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Rockies challenged (tag play), call on the field was overturned: Edouard Julien steals (2) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Freddy Fermin reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Kyle Karros.

notableEvents.label: Tyler Freeman pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Freeman grounds into a double play, shortstop Jake Cronenworth to second baseman Fernando Tatis Jr. to first baseman Gavin Sheets. Kyle Karros out at 2nd. Tyler Freeman out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Tyler Freeman GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Freeman grounds into a double play, shortstop Jake Cronenworth to second baseman Fernando Tatis Jr. to first baseman Gavin Sheets. Kyle Karros out at 2nd. Tyler Freeman out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: TJ Rumfield pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: TJ Rumfield singles on a line drive to center fielder Jackson Merrill.

notableEvents.label: Tyler Freeman pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Freeman singles on a line drive to right fielder Bryce Johnson. TJ Rumfield to 2nd.
